selections.name: Super Fatale
selections.reason: Drops in class after contesting G3 company. Favorable draw and gets a weight allowance.

selections.name: Consignment
selections.reason: Proven in Stakes grade with a 2nd in the Crystal Slipper. Class runner of the field.

selections.name: Fast Break
selections.reason: Solid 5th in the LR Perth Stakes on debut. Will strip fitter and appreciate the experience.

selections.name: Vinny Nay
selections.reason: First starter by I Am Invincible. Showed ability with a close 2nd in a recent trial. Good barrier.

danger_horse.name: Street Monarch
danger_horse.reason: Faced tough opposition in the G3 Gimcrack on debut. Capable of sharp improvement.

selections.name: Testy Pharoah
selections.reason: Strong 3rd in Class 2 company last start. Well placed here and has the tactical speed to feature.

selections.name: Xentaro
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Drops back from Open 3yo grade and can improve sharply.

selections.name: Linchpin
selections.reason: Has been contesting Listed races. Wide draw is a slight concern but class carries him a long way.

selections.name: Gangster Goddess
selections.reason: Consistent filly who was a solid 2nd in Class 3 company recently. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Sassy Snippet
danger_horse.reason: First starter with William Pike aboard. Impressive trial winner who demands respect.

selections.name: Truly Loyal
selections.reason: Debutant with William Pike in the saddle. Bolted in during a recent trial and looks highly promising despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Perfectly Proper
selections.reason: Drops back to maiden grade after contesting a Listed race. Has shown good early speed.

selections.name: Guarantor
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed in NMW company last prep and has trialled well leading into this.

selections.name: Jolson Al
selections.reason: Just missed on debut when 3rd. Wide barrier makes it tough but has the talent to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Al's Gal
danger_horse.reason: Favorable inside draw and comes off a solid trial placing. Could surprise at odds.

selections.name: She's Capitana
selections.reason: William Pike takes the ride. Drops in class after a solid 4th in Open company. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Scenic George
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd in Class 1 company last start. Draws well and should get a perfect run.

selections.name: Lipstick Jungle
selections.reason: Strong 2nd in Class 3 grade recently. Consistent mare who will be flashing home late.

selections.name: Mandible Magic
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 3. Solid 3rd in NMW1Y grade last start and can be competitive here.

danger_horse.name: Espinho
danger_horse.reason: Finished 4th in Class 1 company last start. Capable of improvement with fitness on his side.

selections.name: Rodney Oh Rodney
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two impressive wins. Draws perfectly and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Nonesospicy
selections.reason: Classy mare who won in Open company last prep. Carries top weight but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Hedawood
selections.reason: William Pike rides. Resuming after a break but has shown ability in higher grades.

selections.name: Baby Pearl
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw. Has contested Open company and can run a bold race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Call Of Duty
danger_horse.reason: Consistent gelding who was 2nd in Class 3 company last prep. Capable of a strong showing.

selections.name: Blazing Emerald
selections.reason: Solid 3rd in BM66+ grade last start. Gets the inside draw and looks primed for this distance.

selections.name: Saturday Sesh
selections.reason: Consistent performer in this grade. Drawn well and has the tactical speed to be prominent.

selections.name: Tribal Ruler
selections.reason: Impressive winner in Class 3 company last start. Steps up in grade but is in peak form.

selections.name: Caporetto
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind Tribal Ruler last start. Meets him better at the weights and can feature.

danger_horse.name: Otheroneson
danger_horse.reason: Classy veteran who drops in grade. Wide draw is a concern but cannot be dismissed.

selections.name: Argyle Star
selections.reason: William Pike takes the ride after a narrow win in BM62+ grade. Proven stayer who looks hard to beat.

selections.name: Vivarok
selections.reason: Dominant winner in BM70+ company last start. Gets the inside draw and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Royal Trooper
selections.reason: Strong winner in Open company last start. Steps up in distance but has the class to handle it.

selections.name: Mr Bling
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd behind Royal Trooper last start. Gets a weight swing and can turn the tables.

danger_horse.name: Ahh Choux
danger_horse.reason: Solid 3rd in Open company last start. Drawn well and is a genuine staying type.
